transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. We reviewed your account and have a good offer to help close it. Can we talk for a moment?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, am I speaking with Vikram Patel?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I know that's wrong.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry about that — are you saying I have the wrong number, or is Vikram Patel available to speak?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I right now, I'm not working anywhere.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, Vikram. So I am speaking with Vikram Patel, correct? Just want to confirm before we go further.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Jobless. Alright.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, thank you for confirming, Vikram. Your account with DemoLender shows fifty thousand rupees pending, and at 180 days overdue, this does need attention. I'm checking with our team on the best closure offer for your account — but first, can you tell me a bit about your current situation?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Actually, after

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Go ahead, Vikram — after what?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I think the next month, or the after month.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Are you expecting some income or a job to come through next month or the month after?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: It will take two to three months.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. Do you have something lined up — like a job offer or a contract — or is it still uncertain at this point?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, sir. Yes. Yes. Actually, it's my name, but due to some reasons, it wouldn't have be happening. I think it will take more to do three months.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, two to three months is a bit of a wait. Is there any family support or any other source of income you can lean on in the meantime?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No. That's

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, Vikram. No income, no support right now — that's a tough spot. Let me get the best closure offer figures from our team and call you back when you're closer to that two to three month mark. Would that work?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No. What? Sorry. Tell me. I didn't hear you at that time. So that is why I I said it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No worries. I said — you mentioned income in two to three months, so I can schedule a callback around that time with the best closure offer for your account. Does that work for you?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Will you repeat it once again?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure. You said income is coming in two to three months, so I can call you back then with the best closure offer for your account. Does that work?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah. Yeah.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. I'll schedule a callback for about two to three months from now with the exact figures. Just keep in mind, Vikram — the sooner we sort this out, the better it'll be for your credit record. We'll be in touch. Take care. Thank you, Vikram. We'll call you back in a couple of months. Take care and good luck with the job.

function_calls.params: preferred_time="2-3 months", callback_type="wants_payment_amount", reason="Borrower expects income in 2-3 months, wants closure offer figures then"
